overview: E-commerce platform for a dive shop featuring ISR-powered storefront and dynamic admin dashboard. Built with Next.js 15, PostgreSQL, Drizzle ORM, and Midtrans payment integration. Deployed on Vercel with Mailgun for transactional emails and Vercel Blob for image storage. Emphasis on vertical slice architecture with clean separation of domain, application, and presentation layers.

actors.name: Customer
actors.role: Storefront visitor who browses products, manages cart, and places orders

actors.name: Admin
actors.role: Shop staff managing products, orders, customers, and promotions

actors.name: Super Admin
actors.role: Full system access including user management

modules.name: Auth
modules.description: User authentication via NextAuth.js v5 with email/password and OAuth (Google). Role-based access control (customer, admin, super_admin). OTP verification via Mailgun.

modules.name: Products
modules.description: Product catalog with variants, categories, and brands. Supports featured products, image galleries (Vercel Blob), and slug-based URLs. Single availability flag (isActive).

features.text: Product image galleries via Vercel Blob

modules.name: Cart
modules.description: Client-side cart using React Context with localStorage persistence. Simple item management without server sync.

modules.name: Orders
modules.description: Order management with atomic transactions, status tracking, and Midtrans integration. Includes order items, shipping, tax, and discount calculations.

features.text: Order creation with atomic transaction (order + items + payment)
Order status workflow (pending_payment → processing → shipped → delivered)

modules.name: Payment
modules.description: Midtrans payment gateway with provider abstraction. Webhook handling for payment status updates.

features.text: Multiple payment methods (GoPay, bank transfer, QRIS)

modules.name: Customers
modules.description: Customer profiles with addresses, order history, and spending tracking.

modules.name: Promotions
modules.description: Discount codes with percentage or fixed amounts. Usage limits and validity periods.

modules.name: Banners
modules.description: Hero carousel and promotional banners. Simple CRUD with position and sort order.

modules.name: Dashboard
modules.description: Admin dashboard with sales statistics and charts.

modules.name: Home
modules.description: Storefront homepage with hero, featured products, and category navigation.

modules.name: SEO
modules.description: Search engine optimization features for product discoverability.

features.text: Open Graph tags for social sharing

constraints.text: Money stored as integer cents to avoid floating-point issues
Storefront must use ISR for SEO (Server Components)
Admin panel must use CSR with TanStack Query for real-time updates
Wireframes exist and define UI structure
Deployed on Vercel with edge functions support
